skills.name: Mechanical Genius (Passive)
skills.description: Beatrix can equip and switch between four different weapons, giving her access to different attack styles and unique ultimates.

skills.name: Masterful Gunner
skills.description: Switches to another equipped weapon, changing Beatrix's basic attacks and combat style.

skills.name: Tactical Reposition
skills.description: Dashes in the chosen direction while reloading and repositioning for combat.

skills.name: Ultimate
skills.description: Uses the ultimate attack of the currently equipped weapon, dealing powerful damage based on the selected firearm.

skills.name: Invisible Armor (Passive)
skills.description: Aamon enters camouflage after not dealing or taking damage for a short duration and enhances his attacks with shard energy.

skills.name: Soul Shards
skills.description: Throws shard energy that damages enemies and creates additional shards around the target.

skills.name: Slayer Shards
skills.description: Releases shard energy in a chosen direction, dealing damage and collecting nearby shards.

skills.name: Endless Shards (Ultimate)
skills.description: Launches all collected shards at a locked target, dealing massive burst damage.

skills.name: Tai Chi (Passive)
skills.description: Using a skill grants Akai a shield that absorbs damage for a short duration.

skills.name: Headbutt
skills.description: Akai charges forward and knocks back the first enemy hit, dealing physical damage.

skills.name: Body Slam
skills.description: Akai jumps to a target area, dealing damage and slowing nearby enemies.

skills.name: Heavy Spin (Ultimate)
skills.description: Akai spins rapidly, becoming immune to crowd control while continuously knocking back nearby enemies.

skills.name: Contract: Soul Steal (Passive)
skills.description: Aldous gains permanent damage by collecting Soul Steal stacks from enemies and minions.

skills.name: Contract: Chase Fate
skills.description: Empowers Aldous's next basic attack, dealing massive physical damage.

skills.name: Contract: Explosion
skills.description: Creates a protective barrier that explodes after a short delay, dealing damage to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Contract: Chase Fate (Ultimate)
skills.description: Reveals all enemy heroes and allows Aldous to charge toward a selected target anywhere on the map.

skills.name: Blood Ancestry (Passive)
skills.description: Alice absorbs Blood Orbs dropped by enemies to permanently increase her attributes.

skills.name: Flowing Blood
skills.description: Launches a blood orb that damages enemies and allows Alice to teleport to its location.

skills.name: Blood Awe
skills.description: Deals magic damage and immobilizes nearby enemies.

skills.name: Blood Ode (Ultimate)
skills.description: Continuously drains the life of nearby enemies, restoring Alice's HP while dealing magic damage.

skills.name: Beta, Advance! (Passive)
skills.description: Beta assists Alpha's attacks, dealing additional true damage after multiple hits.

skills.name: Rotary Impact
skills.description: Alpha slashes forward, dealing physical damage and slowing enemies.

skills.name: Force Swing
skills.description: Swings his spear in a wide area, dealing damage and restoring HP when hitting enemies.

skills.name: Spear of Alpha (Ultimate)
skills.description: Alpha charges toward a target, knocking enemies airborne while Beta follows up with additional attacks.

skills.name: Pursuit (Passive)
skills.description: After using a skill, Alucard's next basic attack dashes to the target and deals extra damage.

skills.name: Groundsplitter
skills.description: Leaps to a target location and deals physical damage to enemies.

skills.name: Whirling Smash
skills.description: Performs a spinning slash that damages nearby enemies.

skills.name: Fission Wave (Ultimate)
skills.description: Greatly enhances lifesteal and unleashes powerful energy waves that deal physical damage.

skills.name: Smart Heart (Passive)
skills.description: Angela gains movement speed whenever she uses a skill.

skills.name: Love Waves
skills.description: Releases love energy that damages enemies and heals allied heroes.

skills.name: Puppet-on-a-String
skills.description: Attaches strings to an enemy, dealing magic damage and immobilizing them if they fail to escape.

skills.name: Heartguard (Ultimate)
skills.description: Attaches herself to an allied hero anywhere on the map, granting a shield and allowing Angela to cast skills through that ally.

skills.name: Warmonger (Passive)
skills.description: Argus periodically empowers his basic attack, dealing extra damage and restoring HP.

skills.name: Demonic Grip
skills.description: Launches a demonic hand that pulls Argus toward an enemy or drags the enemy toward him.

skills.name: Meteoric Sword
skills.description: Charges forward and slashes enemies in his path, dealing physical damage.

skills.name: Eternal Evil (Ultimate)
skills.description: Argus becomes immune to death for a short duration and converts damage taken into HP after the effect ends.

skills.name: Demon Gaze (Passive)
skills.description: Marks enemies, allowing Arlott to dash through them with enhanced attacks.

skills.name: Dauntless Strike
skills.description: Strikes a target area, dealing physical damage and marking enemies hit.

skills.name: Vengeance
skills.description: Dashes to a marked target, dealing damage and resetting the skill when consuming a mark.

skills.name: Final Slash (Ultimate)
skills.description: Unleashes a powerful slash that pushes enemies and deals heavy physical damage.

skills.name: Frigid Breath (Passive)
skills.description: Atlas slows nearby enemies after casting skills, reducing their attack and movement speed.

skills.name: Annihilate
skills.description: Smashes the ground to deal magic damage to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Perfect Match
skills.description: Separates Atlas from his mech, increasing mobility before reuniting.

skills.name: Fatal Links (Ultimate)
skills.description: Chains nearby enemies together and slams them into a chosen location, dealing magic damage.

skills.name: Pride of Ice (Passive)
skills.description: Aurora builds frost energy that enhances her skills with freezing effects.

skills.name: Frost Shock
skills.description: Launches icy energy that deals magic damage to enemies.

skills.name: Bitter Frost
skills.description: Blasts a target with freezing power, dealing magic damage and slowing them.

skills.name: Cold Destruction (Ultimate)
skills.description: Summons a massive ice attack that deals area magic damage and freezes enemies caught in the blast.

skills.name: Chivalry Fist (Passive)
skills.description: Basic attacks and skills can create knockback effects and enhance Badang's combos.

skills.name: Fist Wind
skills.description: Punches forward and creates a damaging wind wave.

skills.name: Fist Break
skills.description: Dashes to a target location and creates a wall that blocks enemy movement.

skills.name: Fist Crack (Ultimate)
skills.description: Rapidly unleashes powerful punches in front of him, dealing continuous physical damage.

skills.name: Bloodthirst (Passive)
skills.description: Recovers HP after eliminating enemy units or heroes.

skills.name: Soul Lock
skills.description: Charges toward an enemy, dealing physical damage.

skills.name: Cyclone Sweep
skills.description: Spins continuously with his axe, damaging nearby enemies.

skills.name: Lethal Counter (Ultimate)
skills.description: Slams his axe into the ground, dealing true damage based on the target's lost HP.

skills.name: Shark Bite (Passive)
skills.description: After using a skill, Bane's next basic attack deals extra physical damage.

skills.name: Crab Claw Cannon
skills.description: Fires a cannonball that explodes and damages enemies.

skills.name: Ale
skills.description: Drinks ale to restore HP and increase movement speed.

skills.name: Deadly Catch (Ultimate)
skills.description: Summons giant sea creatures that rush forward, damaging and knocking up enemies.

skills.name: Big Guy (Passive)
skills.description: Barats and Detona gain size and attributes by attacking enemies continuously.

skills.name: So-Called Teamwork
skills.description: Detona spits toxic saliva that explodes and damages enemies.

skills.name: Missile Expert
skills.description: Fires explosive missiles that deal area damage.

skills.name: Detona's Welcome (Ultimate)
skills.description: Detona swallows an enemy hero and spits them out at a chosen location, dealing damage.

skills.name: Baxia Mark (Passive)
skills.description: Reduces the healing and shield effects received by nearby enemies.

skills.name: Baxia Shield Unity
skills.description: Transforms into a rolling shield and charges toward enemies.

skills.name: Shield of Spirit
skills.description: Throws his shield, dealing magic damage and slowing enemies.

skills.name: Tortoise's Puissance (Ultimate)
skills.description: Creates lava trails while moving, continuously dealing magic damage to enemies.

skills.name: Abyss Corrosion (Passive)
skills.description: Basic attacks apply Abyss Marks that increase damage dealt to enemies.

skills.name: Abyss Impact
skills.description: Launches a powerful attack that deals physical damage and applies an Abyss Mark.

skills.name: Corrosive Strike
skills.description: Dashes in a chosen direction while firing an enhanced attack.

skills.name: Torn-Apart Memory (Ultimate)
skills.description: Consumes Abyss Marks on enemies to deal massive burst physical damage.

skills.name: Mecha Legs (Passive)
skills.description: Critical hits increase Bruno's critical chance and movement speed.

skills.name: Volley Shot
skills.description: Kicks an energy ball that deals damage and returns after hitting an enemy.

skills.name: Flying Tackle
skills.description: Slides forward, damaging and briefly stunning enemies.

skills.name: Wave of the World Animation (Ultimate)
skills.description: Launches an energy ball that bounces between enemies, dealing physical damage.

skills.name: Vampire Pact (Passive)
skills.description: Steals physical and magic defense from nearby enemy heroes.

skills.name: Crimson Flower
skills.description: Summons spinning flowers that damage enemies and restore HP.

skills.name: Bloodbath
skills.description: Charges and stuns the first enemy hero hit.

skills.name: Curse of Blood (Ultimate)
skills.description: Links enemy heroes together so they share damage and crowd control effects.

skills.name: Overflowing (Passive)
skills.description: Permanently increases Cecilion's maximum mana when his skills hit enemies.

skills.name: Bat Impact
skills.description: Summons giant bats that deal magic damage in a target area.

skills.name: Sanguine Claws
skills.description: Summons blood claws that damage and immobilize enemies.

skills.name: Bats Feast (Ultimate)
skills.description: Releases a swarm of bats that attack nearby enemies while restoring HP.

skills.name: Trouble Maker (Passive)
skills.description: After casting a skill, Chang'e's enhanced basic attacks deal additional magic damage.

skills.name: Moon Palace Immersion
skills.description: Gains a shield and enhances her abilities for a short duration.

skills.name: Crescent Moon
skills.description: Launches a crescent-shaped projectile that damages and slows enemies.

skills.name: Meteor Shower (Ultimate)
skills.description: Calls down a continuous shower of meteors that deal magic damage over a large area.

skills.name: Passive
skills.description: Chip gains enhanced mobility and special portal interactions while moving around the battlefield.

skills.name: Crash Course
skills.description: Charges forward, dealing damage and knocking back enemies.

skills.name: Shortcut
skills.description: Creates a portal that allows Chip to quickly reposition.

skills.name: Portal Party (Ultimate)
skills.description: Creates connected portals that allow allies to teleport and engage enemies.

skills.name: Only Fast (Passive)
skills.description: After moving a certain distance, Chou's next basic attack deals extra damage and slows enemies.

skills.name: Jeet Kune Do
skills.description: Performs a series of punches, with the third attack knocking enemies airborne.

skills.name: Shunpo
skills.description: Dashes a short distance and becomes briefly immune to crowd control.

skills.name: The Way of Dragon (Ultimate)
skills.description: Delivers a powerful kick that knocks an enemy away before following up with another strike.

skills.name: Performer's Delight (Passive)
skills.description: Continuously attacking enemies increases Cici's movement speed and damage.

skills.name: Yo-Yo Blitz
skills.description: Throws her yo-yo to repeatedly strike nearby enemies.

skills.name: Buoyant Bounce
skills.description: Jumps toward a target location, gaining mobility and avoiding obstacles.

skills.name: Curtain Call (Ultimate)
skills.description: Links two enemy heroes together, restricting their movement and dealing damage.

skills.name: Battle Side-by-Side (Passive)
skills.description: Dexter assists Claude's attacks, increasing attack speed and damage.

skills.name: Art of Thievery
skills.description: Steals movement speed and attack speed from enemies.

skills.name: Battle Mirror Image
skills.description: Summons Dexter to a location and allows Claude to swap positions.

skills.name: Blazing Duet (Ultimate)
skills.description: Claude and Dexter fire continuously at nearby enemies while moving.

skills.name: Double Shot (Passive)
skills.description: After using a skill, Clint's next basic attack fires twice with increased range.

skills.name: Quick Draw
skills.description: Shoots quickly in front of him, dealing physical damage.

skills.name: Trap Bomb
skills.description: Throws a trap that explodes and slows enemies.

skills.name: Howitzer (Ultimate)
skills.description: Fires a powerful long-range explosive shot that can be cast multiple times.

skills.name: Starlit Hourglass (Passive)
skills.description: Hitting enemies with skills reduces the cooldown of all Cyclops's skills.

skills.name: Shock Wave
skills.description: Releases two shock waves that deal magic damage.

skills.name: Planets Attack
skills.description: Summons rotating stars that damage nearby enemies.

skills.name: Star Power Lockdown (Ultimate)
skills.description: Launches a giant magic sphere that tracks and immobilizes the target.

skills.name: Young Again (Passive)
skills.description: After death, Diggie transforms into an egg and can continue moving around the battlefield.

skills.name: Auto Alarm Bomb
skills.description: Throws an owl bomb that automatically chases nearby enemies.

skills.name: Reverse Time
skills.description: Marks an enemy and pulls them back after a short delay.

skills.name: Time Journey (Ultimate)
skills.description: Grants nearby allies a shield and removes crowd control effects.

skills.name: Wrath of the Abyss (Passive)
skills.description: Every few basic attacks, Dyrroth enhances his next attack and restores HP.

skills.name: Burst Strike
skills.description: Launches a series of slashes that deal physical damage.

skills.name: Spectre Step
skills.description: Dashes toward an enemy, dealing damage and reducing their physical defense.

skills.name: Abysm Strike (Ultimate)
skills.description: Charges briefly before unleashing a devastating strike that deals massive physical damage.

skills.name: Overload (Passive)
skills.description: Basic attacks trigger chain lightning that damages multiple enemies.

skills.name: Earth Shatter
skills.description: Slams the ground to damage and control nearby enemies.

skills.name: Onward
skills.description: Charges forward and throws enemies behind her.

skills.name: Primal Wrath (Ultimate)
skills.description: Transforms into a ranged marksman form, greatly increasing attack power.

skills.name: Starmoon Casket (Passive)
skills.description: Converts enemy shields into her own while dealing hybrid damage.

skills.name: Frostmoon Shield
skills.description: Gains a shield and movement speed while damaging nearby enemies.

skills.name: Stardust Dance
skills.description: Spins around, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Falling Starmoon (Ultimate)
skills.description: Charges and leaps to a target location, dealing heavy area damage.

skills.name: Transcendence (Passive)
skills.description: Casting skills enhances Xavier, increasing the power and range of his abilities.

skills.name: Infinite Extension
skills.description: Fires a magic beam that damages enemies in a line.

skills.name: Mystic Field
skills.description: Creates a magical field that slows enemies and enhances Xavier's other skills.

skills.name: Dawning Light (Ultimate)
skills.description: Unleashes a global beam of holy light that deals massive magic damage.

skills.name: Smith's Legacy (Passive)
skills.description: After casting two skills, Julian's next skill becomes enhanced with stronger effects.

skills.name: Scythe
skills.description: Throws a magical scythe that damages enemies.

skills.name: Sword
skills.description: Summons flying swords that attack nearby enemies.

skills.name: Chain
skills.description: Launches chains that immobilize enemies and deal magic damage.

skills.name: Ninjutsu: Trace of Shadow (Passive)
skills.description: Hayabusa's attacks apply Shadow Marks, increasing his damage to enemies.

skills.name: Phantom Shuriken
skills.description: Throws three shurikens that deal damage and restore HP.

skills.name: Quad Shadow
skills.description: Releases four shadows and can teleport to any of them.

skills.name: Ougi: Shadow Kill (Ultimate)
skills.description: Disappears and rapidly slashes nearby enemies multiple times.

skills.name: Cloud Walker (Passive)
skills.description: Ling moves on walls and uses Lightness Points instead of mana.

skills.name: Finch Poise
skills.description: Jumps onto walls and moves swiftly between them.

skills.name: Defiant Sword
skills.description: Dashes toward enemies, dealing critical physical damage.

skills.name: Tempest of Blades (Ultimate)
skills.description: Leaps into the air and strikes the battlefield, knocking enemies airborne.

skills.name: Air Superiority (Passive)
skills.description: Deals increased damage while flying and applies Prey Marks to enemies.

skills.name: Tornado Strike
skills.description: Spins her blades to deal physical damage to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Steel Cable
skills.description: Launches cables that allow Fanny to fly rapidly across the battlefield.

skills.name: Cut Throat (Ultimate)
skills.description: Rushes toward a target and delivers a devastating strike with bonus damage to marked enemies.

skills.name: Dagger Specialist (Passive)
skills.description: After casting a skill, Gusion's next basic attack deals extra magic damage and restores HP.

skills.name: Sword Spike
skills.description: Throws a dagger that marks the target and allows Gusion to dash to it.

skills.name: Shadowblade Slaughter
skills.description: Throws multiple daggers that return to Gusion, dealing magic damage.

skills.name: Incandescence (Ultimate)
skills.description: Resets the cooldown of his other skills and greatly increases his mobility.

skills.name: Soul Cutter (Passive)
skills.description: Each dash increases Lancelot's damage for a short duration.

skills.name: Puncture
skills.description: Dashes through an enemy, dealing physical damage.

skills.name: Thorned Rose
skills.description: Performs a triangular sword attack that deals physical damage.

skills.name: Phantom Execution (Ultimate)
skills.description: Charges briefly before unleashing a powerful dash that deals massive physical damage.

skills.name: Leave It to Me (Passive)
skills.description: Deals increased damage when fighting a single enemy hero.

skills.name: Charged Punch
skills.description: Throws a powerful punch that damages enemies in front.

skills.name: Instant Blast
skills.description: Dashes forward and enhances his next attack.

skills.name: My Turn (Ultimate)
skills.description: Pulls a target into a separate arena for a one-on-one battle with Lieh.

skills.name: Hum, Joy's Rhythm (Passive)
skills.description: Perfectly timed skill casts increase Joy's movement speed and damage.

skills.name: Look, Leonin Crystal!
skills.description: Summons a crystal that deals magic damage.

skills.name: Meow, Rhythm of Joy!
skills.description: Dashes repeatedly with rhythm-based timing, dealing magic damage.

skills.name: Ha, Electrifying Beats! (Ultimate)
skills.description: Becomes immune to crowd control while unleashing multiple electric attacks.

skills.name: Dimensional Rift (Passive)
skills.description: Skills create rifts that explode when touched, dealing extra physical damage.

skills.name: Expansion
skills.description: Slashes forward and creates a dimensional rift.

skills.name: Gauge
skills.description: Dashes through enemies, leaving another dimensional rift.

skills.name: Fracture (Ultimate)
skills.description: Becomes untargetable while performing multiple slashes that create exploding rifts.

skills.name: Ninjutsu: Equinox (Passive)
skills.description: Hanabi gains a shield when at full HP and becomes immune to crowd control while the shield is active.

skills.name: Ninjutsu: Petal Barrage
skills.description: Basic attacks bounce between enemies, dealing physical damage.

skills.name: Ninjutsu: Soul Scroll
skills.description: Throws a scroll that damages enemies and slows them while restoring mana.

skills.name: Forbidden Jutsu: Higanbana (Ultimate)
skills.description: Throws a Higanbana that immobilizes the target and spreads to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Moon Blessing (Passive)
skills.description: Basic attacks increase Miya's attack speed and summon additional arrows at full stacks.

skills.name: Moon Arrow
skills.description: Splits basic attacks into multiple arrows that hit nearby enemies.

skills.name: Arrow of Eclipse
skills.description: Fires a powerful arrow that immobilizes and damages enemies.

skills.name: Hidden Moonlight (Ultimate)
skills.description: Removes all debuffs, becomes invisible for a short time, and gains movement speed.

skills.name: Passive
skills.description: Enhances basic attacks and improves mobility during combat.

skills.name: Skill 1
skills.description: Launches a ranged attack that deals physical damage to enemies.

skills.name: Skill 2
skills.description: Quickly repositions while enhancing the next attack.

skills.name: Ultimate
skills.description: Unleashes a powerful barrage that deals heavy physical damage to enemies.

skills.name: Malefic Gun (Passive)
skills.description: Layla deals more damage to enemies that are farther away.

skills.name: Malefic Bomb
skills.description: Fires an energy bomb that deals physical damage.

skills.name: Void Projectile
skills.description: Launches an energy sphere that slows enemies and increases attack range.

skills.name: Destruction Rush (Ultimate)
skills.description: Fires a massive energy cannon in a straight line, dealing heavy physical damage.

skills.name: Lakeshore Ambience (Passive)
skills.description: After casting a skill, Odette's next basic attack releases a bouncing sound wave.

skills.name: Avian Authority
skills.description: Summons a swan that attacks enemies and deals magic damage.

skills.name: Blue Nova
skills.description: Creates a magic explosion that immobilizes nearby enemies.

skills.name: Swan Song (Ultimate)
skills.description: Continuously releases magical energy around herself, dealing massive magic damage while gaining a shield.
